title: FFI v0.3 tests and runtime bridge discovery fixes

source.subject: fix(ci): Path import in ffi_v03 tests and runtime bridge discovery

body:
Stabilizes ffi_v03 workflow flakes (timeouts, missing symbols) so export FFI coverage is reliable on main.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`f7361aa`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/f7361aa)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): Path import in ffi_v03 tests and runtime bridge discovery
- **Completed:** 2026-05-24

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ci-release`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-post-merge-ci`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **CI and integration hardening** (`v03-post-merge-ci`).
